narrative:
Woodville Twp (precinct in Sandusky County) has 938 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points.
